# Brrtz

> Brrtz is a free beta gear radar for finding used synthesizers, drum machines, samplers, modular gear, effects, and pro audio listings across regional marketplaces and independent shops.

## Primary URLs

- Home and app: https://brrtz.com/
- About: https://brrtz.com/about
- Agent guide: https://brrtz.com/for-agents
- Agent connector spec: https://brrtz.com/agent-connector
- Draft agent tools JSON: https://brrtz.com/agent-tools.json
- Regions: https://brrtz.com/regions
- Sources: https://brrtz.com/sources
- Gear model pages: https://brrtz.com/gear

## Search URL Pattern

Agents may open Brrtz searches with query, region, and category parameters:

`https://brrtz.com/search?q=moog%20voyager&region=bay-area&category=synthesizers`

Supported beta region IDs:

- `japan`
- `bay-area`
- `los-angeles`
- `east-coast`

Supported category IDs:

- `all`
- `synthesizers`
- `drum-machines`
- `samplers`
- `modular`
- `effects-pedals`
- `pro-audio`

## Gear Model Pages

- Moog Minimoog: https://brrtz.com/gear/moog-minimoog
- ARP 2600: https://brrtz.com/gear/arp-2600
- Roland TR-808: https://brrtz.com/gear/roland-tr-808

## What Brrtz Does

- Searches or prepares searches across multiple used gear sources.
- Normalizes gear listings with source, region, currency, title, price, URL, and image context.
- Helps users save searches, watch items, and filter out non-gear noise.
- Links users back to original listing sources.

## Boundaries

- Brrtz is not the merchant of record.
- Brrtz does not own source listings.
- Do not crawl `/api/` routes or republish source listing databases.
- Prefer linking users to Brrtz search URLs or original source URLs.

## Planned Agent Direction

Brrtz is being prepared for a future Model Context Protocol connector. Candidate tools include `search_gear`, `get_regions`, `get_sources`, `save_search`, `watch_listing`, and `get_new_matches`.

See the draft connector spec at https://brrtz.com/agent-connector and machine-readable draft at https://brrtz.com/agent-tools.json.
